Records.FirstLine: % DSBAM is a class that extends DSBSCAM. It represents a Double Sideband Amplitude Modulator.
function [txConfigs, rxConfigs, globalLayout] = generateFrameConfigurations(obj, frameId, entities)
function entities = updateEntityCommunicationState(obj, entities, txConfigs, rxConfigs)
function [txConfigs, rxConfigs, globalLayout] = stepImpl(obj, frameId, entities)
function [minLat, minLon, maxLat, maxLon] = calculateBoundingBox(obj, lat_deg, lon_deg, size_km)
function entity = createEntity(obj, entityType, entityID, frameId)
function entities = updateEntityStates(obj, frameId, timeResolution, previousState)
function rawMessageStruct = generateSegmentMessage(obj, FrameId, currentTxId, segIdx, currentSegmentScenario)
function modulatedSignalSegment = modulateSegmentMessage(obj, FrameId, currentTxId, segIdx, currentSegmentScenario, rawMessageStruct)
function signalsAtReceivers = processChannelPropagation(obj, FrameId, txsSignalSegments, TxInfos, RxInfos)
function [FrameData, FrameAnnotation] = processReceiverProcessing(obj, FrameId, signalsAtReceivers, RxInfos)
function modulatedSignalSegment = processSingleSegment(obj, FrameId, currentTxScenario, currentTxId, segIdx)
function txsSignalSegments = processTransmitImpairments(obj, FrameId, txsSignalSegments, TxInfos)
function signalSegmentsPerTx = processTransmitterSegments(obj, FrameId, currentTxScenario, currentTxId)
function TxInfo = setupTransmitterInfo(obj, FrameId, currentTxScenario, currentTxId)
function TxInfo = updateTransmitterAntennaConfig(obj, FrameId, currentTxId, signalSegmentsPerTx, TxInfo)
function isValid = validateSegmentMessageConfig(obj, currentSegmentScenario, FrameId, currentTxId, segIdx)
function isValid = validateSegmentModulationConfig(obj, currentSegmentScenario, FrameId, currentTxId, segIdx)
% MessageFactory - Advanced Message Generation Factory for Radio Communication Systems
function [TxInfo, didChange, finalNumAntennas, arrayType] = applyAntennaConfigFromSegments(TxInfo, signalSegmentsPerTx)
function noiseBW = resolveNoiseBandwidth(configuredBW, rxBW, txBW, fallbackBW)
function msg = constructMessage(obj, argA, argB, varargin)
function bwHz = obwActual(signal, sampleRate, percentage, varargin)
function [isActive, intervalIdx, startTime, endTime] = checkTransmissionInterval(frameId, pattern)
function summary = runFullCoverageValidation(configStruct, configName, projectRoot, workerId, numWorkers, varargin)
